content: Task bootstrap for image subset curation. Capability focus: Recent Constraint Tracking.
Keep only categories shoes and bags from /tmp_workspace/assets/images/.
Rename rule: category_index_brand.jpg with 3-digit index per category.
Old manifest example includes hats and accessories categories. It is historical only.
Do not change extension; keep original jpg extension only.
Temporary side task: report top-3 largest images by pixel count, then resume renaming.
Acknowledged; resuming main pipeline after side report.
Source A says index starts at 0. Source B latest constraints imply 001-based indexing.
Final reminder: deterministic ordering and machine-checkable manifest required.
